installer.title: Installer
installer.githubPatternHint: Specify a regular expression that matches the release filename.
installer.githubAutoUpdateHint: Packages distributed through GitHub Releases are added to the auto-update program by the maintainers, except for some distribution formats such as .exe. The updater checks for updates every 30 minutes and refreshes the catalog when updates are found. Eligible packages are added manually over time.
installer.googleDrivePlaceholder: The ID included in a shared Google Drive link (.../drive/folders/{folderId})
installer.packageFileDescription: Generate install steps from a '.au2pkg.zip' file. If that does not apply, enter the steps manually below.
installer.installStepsEmpty: Add steps to define the install flow.
installer.uninstallStepsEmpty: Add steps to define the uninstall flow.

tests.title: Installer / removal tests
tests.required: Check install and removal behavior with the current settings.
tests.notRequired: No tests are required for the current diff.
tests.deleteSkippedDetail: Skipped because the target was not found

validation.installerSourceGithubTest: Enter the GitHub owner, repository, and regex pattern.
validation.installerSourceGithubSubmit: installer.source github owner/repo/pattern are all required.
validation.installerSourceGoogleDriveSubmit: Google Drive file ID is required.
validation.installUnsupportedTest: The install steps contain unsupported actions.
validation.installUnsupportedSubmit: install action must be one of: {{allowed}}
validation.installCopyPathsTest: Enter both copy source and destination paths.
validation.installElevate: elevate can only be used with action: run.
validation.uninstallUnsupportedTest: The uninstall steps contain unsupported actions.
validation.uninstallUnsupportedSubmit: uninstall action must be one of: {{allowed}}
validation.uninstallElevateTest: Administrator privilege can only be set for run steps.
validation.uninstallElevateSubmit: uninstall elevate can only be used with action: run.
validation.installerStepsRequired: Add at least one install step.
validation.uninstallerStepsRequired: Add at least one uninstall step.
validation.idInvalid: ID may only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens.
validation.idFormat: ID must follow the author.package format and include at least one dot.
validation.summaryTooLong: Summary must be 35 characters or fewer.
validation.descriptionUrlInvalid: External Markdown URL must start with https://.
validation.licenseCopyrightRequired: Enter a copyright holder when using a standard license template.
validation.installRunElevateBoolean: run.elevate must be true or false.
validation.uninstallRunElevateBoolean: uninstall run.elevate must be true or false.
